creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
(In reply to ILUXA from comment #0)
Did you succeed in testing it in poudriere?
I'm trying to create an updated port but I'm stuck on:

[00:00:54] ====>> Error: x11-wm/windowmaker incorrectly depends on itself. Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.
[00:01:13] ====>> Error: Fatal errors encountered calculating dependencies
[00:01:13] ====>> Cleaning up
[00:01:13] ====>> Unmounting file systems

Regards,
Marco
